process_details: Heated to 5 °C above the melting point at 10 °C/min, held for 5 min, then quenched at uncontrolled rate to -50 °C and held for 15 min. Second heating extended to storage temperature.
detection_methods: DSC, MDSC, FT-IR imaging, polarized light microscopy
notes: Storage above Tg (T_s = Tg + 0.3*(Tm50:50 - Tg)). Crystallization detected by DSC after 5 weeks (melting endotherm at 132 °C). Phase separation detected by FT-IRi after 1 day. | [review] DSC H/C/H cycle for GFA classification was NOT performed. Second heating ended at storage temperature, not above Tm. Therefore crystallizes_on_dsc_cooling and crystallizes_on_dsc_reheating set to null (measurement not performed for Class 1/2/3 assessment), and gfa_class_dsc should remain null. Pajula 2014 used DSC only for sample preparation, not for Baird et al. 2010 GFA classification.; Tg updated from Kilpelainen et al. 2020 (DOI: 10.1016/j.ejpb.2020.08.007), Table 2, DSC 10 K/min, n=3, replacing Pajula 2014 TMDSC value. Three pairs in Pajula 2014 (terfenadine-paracetamol, terfenadine-indomethacin, indomethacin-paracetamol) were re-measured by Kilpelainen 2020 with standard DSC 10 K/min, enabling cross-corpus consistency.

detection_methods: DSC, MDSC, FT-IR imaging, polarized light microscopy
notes: Crystallization detected by DSC after 2 weeks (melting endotherms at 93, 113, 125 °C). Tg in mixture after 5 weeks (25.2 °C) corresponded to pure paracetamol Tg (24.3 °C), indicating phase separation/crystallization. | [review] Pair Tg after 5 weeks of storage (25.2 °C) is within 1 K of pure paracetamol Tg (24.3 °C), indicating phase separation/crystallization rather than a co-amorphous state at the 5-week timepoint (initial Tg = 35.8 °C is between pure components and acceptable).; DSC H/C/H cycle for GFA classification was NOT performed. Second heating ended at storage temperature, not above Tm. Therefore crystallizes_on_dsc_cooling and crystallizes_on_dsc_reheating set to null (measurement not performed for Class 1/2/3 assessment), and gfa_class_dsc should remain null. Pajula 2014 used DSC only for sample preparation, not for Baird et al. 2010 GFA classification.; Tg updated from Kilpelainen et al. 2020 (DOI: 10.1016/j.ejpb.2020.08.007), Table 2, DSC 10 K/min, n=3, replacing Pajula 2014 TMDSC value. Three pairs in Pajula 2014 (terfenadine-paracetamol, terfenadine-indomethacin, indomethacin-paracetamol) were re-measured by Kilpelainen 2020 with standard DSC 10 K/min, enabling cross-corpus consistency.
